body.en:
Professional developers don't just start typing code. They **plan first**. And with Claude Code, there's a special way to do this: a file called **CLAUDE.md**.

Think of CLAUDE.md as a **brief for your AI assistant** — it tells Claude what the project is, how it should work, and what technologies to use.
body.zh:
专业开发者不会直接开始写代码。他们**先规划**。使用Claude Code时，有一种特别的方法：一个叫**CLAUDE.md**的文件。

把CLAUDE.md想象成**给AI助手的简报**——告诉Claude项目是什么、应该怎么工作、用什么技术。

body.en: Every project lives in its own folder. Let's create one for your task tracker app. We'll use the **mkdir** command (make directory) to create a new folder, then **cd** to move into it.
body.zh: 每个项目都有自己的文件夹。让我们为你的任务管理应用创建一个。我们用**mkdir**命令（创建目录）新建文件夹，然后**cd**进入。

body.en: Create a new folder for your project and navigate into it.
body.zh: 为项目创建新文件夹并进入。

body.en:
A good CLAUDE.md includes:

- **Project name and description** — what are you building?
- **Tech stack** — what tools/languages to use
- **Key features** — what should the app do?
- **Structure** — how should files be organized?

Don't worry about getting it perfect. A rough plan is better than no plan.
body.zh:
好的CLAUDE.md包含：

- **项目名称和描述** —— 你在做什么？
- **技术栈** —— 用什么工具/语言？
- **核心功能** —— 应用该做什么？
- **结构** —— 文件怎么组织？

不用追求完美。粗略的计划比没有计划好。

body.en: Here's a simple CLAUDE.md for a task tracker. You can customize this for any project!
body.zh: 这是一个任务管理器的CLAUDE.md示例。你可以为任何项目定制！

codeBlock.code:
# Task Tracker

A simple task management app.

## Tech Stack
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Single page, no frameworks
- LocalStorage for data

## Features
- Add new tasks
- Mark tasks complete
- Delete tasks
- Tasks persist after page reload

## Structure
- index.html (main page)
- style.css (styling)
- app.js (logic)
codeBlock.label: CLAUDE.md

body.en:
With CLAUDE.md in place, you can give Claude **structured instructions**. Instead of vague requests, you can say:

"Read the CLAUDE.md and build the basic structure for this project."

Claude will read your plan and follow it. This is how professionals work with AI — **clear plans lead to clear results.**
body.zh:
有了CLAUDE.md，你可以给Claude**结构化指令**。不再模糊请求，你可以说：

「读CLAUDE.md并为这个项目构建基础结构。」

Claude会读你的计划并遵循。这就是专业人士使用AI的方式——**清晰的计划带来清晰的结果。**

body.en: You've got a project folder and a plan. In the next lesson, Claude will read your CLAUDE.md and build the app structure. You're managing this project like a pro!
body.zh: 你有了项目文件夹和计划。下一课Claude会读你的CLAUDE.md并构建应用结构。你已经像专业人士一样管理项目了！
